# InQsi

InQsi is a sports market intelligence web application.

Purpose:
- Review sports market movement
- Organize game signal context
- Show market data availability clearly
- Support watchlists and alerts
- Provide review history when saved records are available

Primary message:
Find where your picks go wrong before you lock it in.

Public routes:
- /
- /sports
- /picks-audit
- /game-leans
- /best-lines
- /parlay-scanner
- /live-market
- /performance
- /methodology
- /pricing

Data policy:
If verified market data is unavailable, InQsi uses a clear waiting state rather than artificial results.
